title: Tripodanthus destructor
taxonomy: Tripodanthus destructor is classified within the family Celastraceae and the order Celastrales. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. This classification places Tripodanthus destructor among the flowering plants, specifically within the asterid clade. The family Celastraceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the bittersweet or staff vine family. The classification of Tripodanthus destructor is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other plant species.
